templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/coldwatercreek/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/ColdwaterCreek

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We don't currently offer free shipping, but all promos will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: We don't handle post-purchase requests via text. Please email your request to customerservice@coldwatercreek.com or feel free to call this number 888-678-5576 Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.coldwatercreek.com/shipping-returns/#returns

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.coldwatercreek.com/account.php?action=order_status

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@coldwatercreek.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 888-678-5576 between 8AM - 10PM ET or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Once shipped, an order typically takes 4-8 business days to arrive.

templates.name: Sizing (shoes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our shoes generally run true to size and you can find the size chart on each product page. Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Sizing (clothes)
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! We offer styles in Misses, Petites and Women's Plus so everyone is able to find the perfect fit. You can check out our size charts here: https://www.coldwatercreek.com/size-charts Would you mind sharing your usual size?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@coldwatercreek.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Is my item on backorder?
templates.content: If the item is on backorder, after picking size and color you'll see a backorder message that will tell you the date that the item is expected to ship. You may add it to your bag and complete the checkout process to reserve the item. Your credit card will not be charged until the item ships.

templates.name: Size differences
templates.content:
Our Misses sizing is proportioned for women 5'4" - 5'8" who wear sizes 2-20.
Our Women's sizing is designed to fit and flatter a plus-size woman's figure and is perfectly proportioned for women who wear sizes 16W-26W.
Our Petite sizing is proportioned for women under 5'4" who wear size 2P-20P.

templates.name: Online catalog
templates.content: You can check out our catalog here: https://www.coldwatercreek.com/our-catalog#

templates.name: Size offer
templates.content:
We offer our products in three distinct size ranges:
• Misses - 2-20/XS-XL
• Petites - 2P-20P/PXS-PXL
• Women's - 16W-26W/1X-3X.
• Tall - designed for Misses sizes, Tall sizes are offered in a selection of pants to better fit customers 5'8" - 6'0".
